name: libpod-constants-perl
title: libpod-constants-perl
summary: module for including constants from POD
description:
module for including constants from POD
This module allows you to specify those constants that should be
documented in your POD, and pull them out a run time in a fairly
arbitrary fashion.
.
Pod::Constants uses Pod::Parser to do the parsing of the source file.
It has to open the source file it is called from, and does so directly
either by lookup in %INC or by assuming it is $0 if the caller is
"main" (or it can't find %INC{caller()})
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libpod-constants-perl because module for including constants from POD.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libpod-constants-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libpod-constants-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libpod-constants-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
